creator: garga@FreeBSD.org
text:
I added the rcNG script you sent me in PR ports/110109, in that time i added
it just as an example, but a lot of people told me and it's true, the script
it totally out of defaults described on Porters Handbook [1].

One big problem is to use tcpserver on this file, since ucspi-tcp is not a
dependency of qmail port.

I'm removing the file now, and will leave this PR opened if you want to
write a new script and send it here, as a followup.

Please let me know if you will or not do the new rcNG file, because if you
won't, i need to close the PR.

Anyway, thanks for contributing.

[1] http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/
-- 
Renato Botelho <garga @ FreeBSD.org>
               <freebsd @ galle.com.br>
GnuPG Key: http://www.FreeBSD.org/~garga/pubkey.asc

Iowa State -- the high school after high school!
		-- Crow T. Robot
